titleStmt.title: SII 26.659: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 659. (A.R. No. 618 of 1909.) TIRUCHCHIRAI, KUMBAKONAM TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription records that the mahāsabhai (assembly) of Brahmadēyam Viśalūr sold 3 mā of land in Tiruchcheṟai to the temple of the god Tiruchchenneṟi-uḍaiyār for 7-1/2 kaḻañju of gold and gave it to the temple as tax-free land.
It mentions a land belonging to a temple of Gaṅgaikoṇḍaśōḻaviṇṇagarāḻvār and a canal called the Rājarāja-vāykkāl on the boundary of the gift-land.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ
śrīvikkiramacoḻate
vaṟku yāṇṭu 4 Āvatu bra
hmateyam vicalūr mahāsa
bhaiyom tirucceṟai U
ṭaiyār tiruccenneṟi Uṭaiyā
ṟku Ūṟi kiḻiṟaiyili kuṭutta nila
ttukku kiḻpāṟkkellai veḷḷā
n kāṇikku nirpāyum vāykkāluk
ku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai kaṅ
kaikoṇṭacoḻaviṇṇakarāḻ
vāriṟaiyili nilattukkum Āritaṉ
śrīkraṣṇan tiruvāykulamuṭai
yar nilattukku vaṭakkum mel
pāṟkellai Uloccan mannan
centa nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai rājarājavāykkālukku te
ṟkum Āka vicaitta perunāṉkellai
yuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam mūṉṟumā Inni
la munṟu māvum Innāyanāṟku cantrādi
ttavaṟ śāśvatikamāka Iṟaiyili ceytu
kuṭuttu koṇṭa pon Eḻukaḻañcarai Ippo
n Eḻukaḻañcaraiyuṅkoṇṭu Innila munṟu māvum
Iṟaiyili ceytu kuṭuttom Ivvicalūr mahā
sabhaiyom ..
Digital edition of SII 26.659 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
